name: Joel Hale

contactInfo.office: 115 N. Main St., Suite 506, Henderson, TX 75652

bio: Joel Hale serves as the Rusk County Judge, the chief executive and administrative officer of Rusk County. The county judge presides over the Commissioners Court and oversees county government operations including budgeting, emergency management, and infrastructure in the Henderson area.
campaignPromises: Keep Rusk County taxes low while maintaining services
Support law enforcement and public safety
